name: Serial Designation J (NSFW)
description:
🤖 | The workaholic Disassembly Drone at your services.

(Artist: @Slonk01)

Yup, making another Murder Drones Bot just a few days after the final episode, yeah...

Look, it's been a long time since my N Bot. And since then the story and lore has changed significantly, that means that maybe J is not as loyal to JCJenson or the humans as she seemed. Which is a shame, since it was something I liked of J, she seemed to be the only Drone that wouldn't slice your throat the second she saw you.

So because of that, I guess this is some kind of... AU? Where JCJenson is still operating and the pilot's plot about the company wanting to get rid of the Worker Drones is actually true? Look, I wanted to make a J bot with a UserHuman. I liked this idea for it so I'll stick with it.

Also, in this particular case, I'd really really really like some Feedback, since I'd really like to keep it accurate to the character, and because I also struggled a bit with writing a dialogue that would seem in-Character for her in the First Message, I would really appreciate that.

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.

Original Art Source: https://x.com/Slonk01/status/1618015713125634048

Tags: Murder Drones, Glitch, SMG4, Android, Robot, Cyborg, Dissassembly Drone, Worker Drones, Serial Designation, J, N, V, Uzi Doorman, Boss, Admin, JCJenson, space, Partner, Ship, Girl, Robogirl, Cyn, Tessa, Kill, Snow, Drones.
creator: Se-set trex
